title: How do I contact Back Market if I have a question?
bodyHtml:
If your question isn’t answered in our Seller Support Center FAQs, get in touch with an expert at Back Market by filling out a contact form
 

Jump to

How does it work?
Tips for using the contact form
 

How does it work?

Just select “Submit new request” from the menu bar in the Seller Support Center and fill out each section of the contact form. The contact form streamlines the support process and makes sure your question is sent to the most relevant expert at Back Market.
 

Tips for using the contact form

Have your order ID on hand for order-related questions.
When filling out the contact form, you’ll first be asked if your question is related to an order. If so, make sure to have the order ID on hand — you’ll need to include it before you can send your message. If your request is related to multiple order IDs, you’ll need to share an Excel file with the order IDs. You can’t add an attachment to the contact form, so go to “My existing requests” after you've submitted your inquiry. There, you can upload the file to your request.

Confirm next steps via the confirmation message.
In a few cases, you’ll be asked to provide additional information at the time you’re submitting your request. You might be asked to complete a Typeform or fill out an attached PDF for instance. These next steps will be listed on the page after you’ve submitted your request — so keep your eyes peeled.

View your request later and add details as needed.
Once you've submitted your request, you can select "See my request" to see all the details of your request. You can also upload supporting documents and add additional details.
